original: This spacer’s a lotta woman - tall, broad, curvy in all the right ways, and wearing next to nothing so all that dusky draconic flesh is put on blatant display. The gryvain techno-scav’s carrying a hellaciously large-bored laser rifle, content to blast at you from a distance while her little drone companion keeps you distracted.
\n\nYou can see energy building up around the muzzle of that oversized laser blaster - you’d better WAIT (and find cover)!

\n\nYou were ready for her, though. Just before she can take the shot, you duck into cover and get real small. Her visor’s good, but not good enough to account for whatever’s inside all these crates and boxes refracting her laser bolt! The shot scatters harmlessly all around you!
\n\n“I swear on the Goddess, [pc.boyGirl],” she snarls, working the lever under her rifle to cycle another battery in. “It’s just a stun bolt. Quit squirming already!”

\n\nYou run, ducking and weaving, trying to lose her lock on you... but her scope is too good, automatically correcting for your every desperate move. Her shot slams into you with supernova force, sending you crashing into the nearest wall and knocking the wind right out of you!
\n\n“Gotcha!” the sniper smirks, cycling the lever under her trigger to eject the spent battery. “Don’t worry sweet thing, it’s just a stun bolt. Now stop squirming...”
\n\nEvery muscle in your extremities is firing off in its own, leaving you twitching and sputtering out of control. Holy fuck that hurts!

\n\nBefore you can formulate an answer, the dragon-woman draws a device and throws it on the floor between you. It detonates on impact, causing thick clouds of oily black smoke to billow out and fill the room. You cough, waving your hands around your face.
\n\n“Don’t worry,” comes her voice, echoing all around you. “I can still see you, sweet thing. Just stand still for momma...”
\n\nYou manage to twist out of the way just in time as a small silver dart snaps past you, ricocheting off the bulkhead behind you with a dull tink! The gryvain huffs and grabs her rifle again!

\n\nBefore you can react, there’s already a little thumb-sized dart sticking out of your [pc.armor]. You draw it out on instinct, gritting your teeth as a drop of blood follows it... oh no. Your eyes go wide as a wave of nausea and dizziness hits you, sending you reeling against the nearest bulkhead. You’ve been tranquilized!
\n\n(She may be easier to take down another way...)
You duck into cover before you get cauterized by the beam!
You’re pelted by a series of short energy bursts!
